channel.title: Byok on Arthur's Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Byok on Arthur's Portfolio

item.title: Philosophical Chamber
item.description: This demo showcases a philosophical debate simulation with multiple agents. The agents use LangGraph to structure their arguments in a shared graph format, allowing for dynamic and interactive debates on various topics.

item.title: Agentic Philosophical Chamber
item.description:
Introduction

Hi there!

I wanted to build something playful with LangGraph, but I did not want it to be another app that tries to solve a productivity problem (there are enough of those out there). The idea that stuck was a philosophical chamber: you ask a question, a small cast of AI agents debate it, and the discussion is turned into a live argument map instead of a wall of text.
